entities.name: DataSync Pro CDC pipeline
entities.description: A data pipeline that was affected by the incident

entities.name: Platform team
entities.description: The team responsible for the schema migration

entities.name: Maria Santos
entities.description: The leader of the Platform team

entities.name: Lisa Park
entities.description: The VP of Engineering who approved the schema migration

entities.name: James Wu
entities.description: The CTO who was escalated to during the incident

entities.name: Alex Rivera
entities.description: The owner of the action item to review with the Security team

entities.name: Engineering Handbook
entities.description: A handbook that specifies the blue-green deployment and escalation policy

relationships.context: The incident affected the DataSync Pro CDC pipeline
The Platform team deployed the schema migration
Maria Santos leads the Platform team
Lisa Park approved the schema migration
The incident was escalated to James Wu
Maria Santos is the owner of the action item to fix the blue-green deployment config drift
Lisa Park is the owner of the action item to add a CDC migration dry-run step
James Wu is the owner of the action item to update the incident escalation policy
Alex Rivera is the owner of the action item to review with the Security team
David Kim needs to approve the cost impact of the incident
